content.text:
*small pause*

People would misunderstand what we're doing, I guess. Get the wrong idea about what the product is.

*slight shrug*

But that's recoverable. You send a follow-up, you clarify. It's not — I mean, I've navigated way messier situations than a miscommunicated launch email. That doesn't really bother me.

*beat*

I keep coming back to the same answer, which is that none of this stuff actually feels like a big deal when I look at it directly. Which is why I can't figure out why I'm not just... doing it.
